sourcesContent:
import React from 'react'; import './Skills.css'; const Skills = () => { const skills1 = [ { name: "UI Design", level: 90 }, { name: "UX Research", level: 85 }, { name: "Wireframing", level: 88 }, { name: "Prototyping", level: 82 }, { name: "Figma", level: 95 } ]; const skills2 = [ { name: "Design Systems", level: 78 }, { name: "Interaction Design", level: 86 }, { name: "Mobile App Design", level: 80 }, { name: "Web UI Design", level: 92 } ]; return (

Skills

Design Skills

{skills1.map((skill, index) => (
{skill.name} {skill.level}%
))}

Technical Skills

{skills2.map((skill, index) => (
{skill.name} {skill.level}%
))}
); }; export default Skills;
